title: 1981-04-16_Pat_162.txt
key_claims: The introduction of Christ (the 23rd letter/hyper-information) into the deterministic world-machine literally loosens physical causality. The uncertainty and acausality of modern post-Newtonian quantum physics is thus the direct result of Christ's infiltration.
Gnosticism, contrasted against the Greco-Babylonian closed cosmos, is the perfect theoretical framework for understanding this transmundane infiltration and the "Faustian" revolt of modern man.

The narrative of Luke-Acts, when processed simultaneously as a visual Gestalt by the right hemisphere (rather than linearly by the left), ceases to be *about* Christ and becomes the literal, formal presence of Christ.

The 1974 experience was a "strange loop" (referencing Hofstadter) where Dick's mind reached back and altered its own genetic programming (DNA), entering a runaway positive feedback loop that exhausted time.
recurring_concepts: **King Felix**: Not just a cypher referring to the Messiah, but actual hyper-information that physically *is* the Messiah (the blood of Christ) acting as a perturbing signal in reality.
reading_excerpt: The introduction of Christ (the 23rd letter/hyper-information) into the deterministic world-machine literally loosens physical causality. The uncertainty and acausality of modern post-Newtonian quantum physics is thus the direct result of Christ's infiltration.
